mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.heat, f.rating, f.distance_meters, f.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.cuisine, f.store_name, f.heat, f.rating, f.distance_meters, f.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM food f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id WHERE LOWER(f.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(f.cuisine) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(f.store_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food (name, cuisine, store_name, heat, rating, distance_meters, destination_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{cuisine}, #{storeName}, #{heat}, #{rating}, #{distanceMeters}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE food SET name = #{name}, cuisine = #{cuisine}, store_name = #{storeName}, heat = #{heat}, rating = #{rating}, distance_meters = #{distanceMeters}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}
